reasoning: The control 'Anti-Malware Protection' focuses on detecting and preventing malware threats. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment, which is akin to anti-malware scanning. Additionally, admission controllers can enforce policies that prevent the deployment of images with known vulnerabilities. Pod Security Standards can also enforce restrictions that reduce the risk of malware execution, such as running containers with restricted capabilities.
title: Anti-Malware Protection
